strategic_objective: Characterize the extent, class stability, and structural impact of strong linear dependencies among packet length, flag count, and subflow features to understand redundancy and effective dimensionality.
key_checks: Quantify dependency strength and linear correlation patterns within and across classes
Evaluate stability of dependencies between DDoS and BENIGN classes
Estimate effective feature dimensionality reduction due to redundancy
success_criteria: Clear delineation of stable versus class-specific dependency patterns
Evidence bounding the degree of redundancy affecting feature space complexity
Insights into whether dependencies mask or inflate feature importance
router_constraints: preserve evidence references related to correlation and redundancy
